name: oms:research
command:
Load the "research" skill by calling the `skill-execute` tool with `{ "skill": "oms/research" }`, then follow the skill's SKILL.md instructions to conduct autonomous multi-step research combining web search and code analysis for the question below.

## Research Question

$ARGUMENTS
description: 自主多步研究，结合网络搜索与代码分析。用法: /oms:research <研究问题>
